_comment: Reference cache policies for the Eru CloudFront distribution. Apply via the AWS console or `aws cloudfront create-cache-policy`. See DeferredWork/DWSet4-M2.md for the runbook.

CachePolicyConfig.Name: eru-m3u8-manifest
CachePolicyConfig.Comment: Short TTL for HLS manifest files — re-transcodes propagate within a minute.

CachePolicyConfig.Name: eru-ts-segment
CachePolicyConfig.Comment: Long TTL for immutable HLS segments. Brotli/gzip off — already binary.

OriginShield._note: S3 bucket lives in ap-south-1; same-region shield = minimum miss-path latency.
